title: Come Sail Away
why_this_song: Come Sail Away by Styx (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 39 times; first heard in: "They said come sail away, come sail away"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've got to be free"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "So climb aboard"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "We'll search for tomorrow"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And I'll try, oh Lord, I'll try"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Come sail away, come sail away
Come sail away, come sail away
Come sail away with me, baby
Reflections in the waves, spark my memory

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sail" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sail" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Singing "Come sail away, come sail away

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Set an open course for the Virgin Sea
Come sail away, come sail away

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Come Sail Away" was released in 1977. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Come Sail Away" foi lançada em 1977. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Come Sail Away" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Come Sail Away" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
